Home | News

Grok 4: Our Most Capable Model

June 15, 2025

Today, xAI is releasing Grok 4, our most advanced model yet. Grok 4 achieves state-of-the-art performance on reasoning, coding, and scientific benchmarks. It is available as grok-4 in the xAI API.

Capabilities

Grok 4 demonstrates exceptional performance on complex multi-step reasoning tasks. It supports a 256k token context window and delivers strong results on GPQA (graduate-level science questions) and AIME (math olympiad problems).

Benchmarks

On GPQA Diamond, Grok 4 achieves 93.1%. On AIME 2024, it scores 96.7%. These are xAI-reported results. Independent evaluation is ongoing.

API Access

Grok 4 is accessible via the xAI API and on the Grok platform. The model ID is grok-4.

Safety

xAI conducts ongoing safety evaluations. No dedicated public system card was published with this release; safety behavior is reported as unknown for external purposes.
